comment.body: @Alma Thank you very much for that Twitter post. I didn't see it until just now. One statement stood out to me in particular and it's something I will remember. Sometimes I feel like my learning doesn't match the speed of others, but I realize I can't compare myself to others it's impossible in the market. "Just because someone learns more slowly doesn't mean they are less valuable." Thank you for what you continue to teach us on a daily basis I may not always capture every move that I see but my ability to interpret your information and make better decisions based on probability is only improving day by day thank you.
